---
title: "Bird Sightings at Sea"
subtitle: "Tidy Tuesday Submission for 2026-04-14"
date: 2026-04-14
author: Ntobeko Sosibo
toc: false
toc-location: left
toc-title: "Outline"
toc-depth: 6
format:
  html:
    mainfont: "Roboto"
    page-layout: article
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 50px
      body-width: 1900px
      margin-width: 25px
      gutter-width: 4rem
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="www/icons/favicon.png">
    embed-resources: true
    self-contained: true
execute:
  freeze: auto
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---
